assertions.assertion: Sets options.PushedAuthorization.Required = true in AddIdentityServer options
Sets options.PushedAuthorization.Lifetime = 300 (5 minutes in seconds, as int not TimeSpan)
assertions.rationale: options.PushedAuthorization.Lifetime = 300 is set. Explicitly noted as int, not TimeSpan.

assertions.assertion: Sets RequirePushedAuthorization = true on the banking_app client
Sets PushedAuthorizationLifetime = 900 on the banking_app client to override global lifetime
Mentions PAR requires Business or Enterprise edition (version >= 7.0)
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'PAR requires Business or Enterprise Edition (version >= 7.0)'.
